description: Public HOMESERVER appliance profile. Harmonia keeps this profile current by running ordered modules and writing receipts.
scaffold_status: public product profile; executable Rust toolchain, Coronatio, and Caduceus modules; represented UDEV and systemd configuration modules
public_source_boundary: public reusable product module concerns and non-secret configuration only
runtime_values: credentials, keys, tokens, passwords, and site-specific values are supplied outside public source

toolchain_contract.proof: root PATH resolves /usr/local/bin wrappers and target-native cargo builds pass before binary promotion

managed_file_update_contract.meaning: A module owns desired files directly in its module directory; Harmonia renders, compares desired bytes to installed bytes, writes only on drift, and records receipts.

update_steps: compare desired bytes to installed bytes
write temporary target only on difference
reload UDEV rules when any rule changed
